title: Align Goo opener chevrons
summary:
Normalize shared opener affordances: grid popout triggers now use a right chevron that rotates open, and GooFolder headers place the chevron on the right as the same 24px muted square treatment.

Browser check: brush-api preset/folder/stack opener metrics all measured 24px toggle boxes, 16px icons, matching muted color, and centered alignment.

Co-authored-by: Miko Meow <101564+mudcube@users.noreply.github.com>
verification: pnpm --dir packages/@goobits/goo exec vitest run src/__tests__/GridPopoutPicker.test.ts src/__tests__/GooBindableStateControls.test.ts src/input/__tests__/GooInput.test.ts
